description: Canonical workflow artifact registry for coding-harness. Each entry tracks a promoted workflow artifact with ownership, validation status, and deprecation info.

artifacts.description: Primary Symphony WORKFLOW.md — Linear issue lifecycle with S|E|G|A|N transition table, tracker config, hooks, and agent execution contract.
Review gate state machine contract — PR verification workflow with check polling, approval evaluation, independence verification, and confidence scoring.
Compact operational spec for the review gate workflow. Distilled from the full workflow contract for agent consumption.
Compact operational spec for the Linear production workflow. Agent-facing distillation of WORKFLOW.md transitions and commands.
Compact operational spec for agent testing gates. Defines pre-commit and pre-handoff test requirements.
Compact operational spec for the docs gate rollout. Enforces documentation co-location and quality requirements.
Compact operational spec for release and change control. Governs versioning, tag creation, and npm publish lifecycle.
Workflow contract specification v1. Defines the S|E|G|A|N format, metadata requirements, validation contract fields, error taxonomy, execution modes, and observability schema.
Prompt template for transforming ad-hoc workflow descriptions into workflow-contract-v1 format.
Adoption plan for integrating Symphony workflows into coding-harness. Defines 7 slices from contract checker through scale-out pilot.
